CVE-2023-7207.title: Debian's cpio contains a path traversal vulnerability. This issue ...
CVE-2023-7207.description: Debian's cpio contains a path traversal vulnerability. This issue was introduced by reverting CVE-2015-1197 patches which had caused a regression in --no-absolute-filenames. Upstream has since provided a proper fix to --no-absolute-filenames.
